title: Practical Vanilla
description: A modpack with basic changes for optimization and some utilities
body:
A basic modpack based on the [Simply Optimized Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) but with some additional mods for [zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), etc and with time keep adding mods/resource packs that makes minecraft more comfortable to play.

It also adds some basic tools for development in minecraft.
